title: Hypixel Skyblock [Simple]
description: This is a simple Hypixel Skyblock modpack. Pre-configured and lightweight.
body:
## ✨ Hypixel Skyblock (Simple)

---

### ⚠️ Regarding 26.1

I'm currently waiting for Firmament to update to 26.1, as it is the last mod that is missing. If they're not updating until Hypixel removes 1.21.11, I'll remove Firmament for the time being.

Progress on Firmament 26.1 can be viewed [here](https://github.com/FirmamentMC/Firmament/pull/2326).

---

This streamlined Hypixel Skyblock modpack delivers a **clean, minimal, and distraction-free** gameplay experience.  
Its goal is simple: **only the essentials, nothing unnecessary**, and a UI that stays out of your way while still giving you every important feature Skyblock players rely on.

### 🚀 Included Hypixel Mods
- [Aaron's Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/aaron-mod)
- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)
- [Scoreboard Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/scoreboard-overhaul)
- [Skyblock Profile Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-profile-viewer)
- [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap)
- [SkyHanni](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyhanni)
- [SkyOcean](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean)  
- [Reward Claim](https://modrinth.com/mod/reward-claim)

### 🌙 What This Pack Stands For
A **lightweight**, **performance-friendly**, and **highly functional** setup.  
No cluttered screens. No overloaded HUDs. No visual noise.  
Just the **core tools**, presented with modern UX and smooth usability.

Perfect for players who want the **power of essential Skyblock mods** while keeping the game looking **clean, stylish, and focused**.

-----

### 🔧 Optional Features (Disabled by Default)

This modpack includes a small number of optional modules that remain **disabled by default**, but users may choose to enable them at their own discretion:

- **Freecam** – Sometimes viewed as an unfair advantage in certain contexts, though opinions vary. It is included for convenience but **remains off by default**.  
- **Fadeless** – Removes the Minecraft fade-in screen to allow instant gameplay. While generally harmless, it modifies client behavior and is therefore **opt-in only**.

Enabling any of these features is a **personal choice**, and users should ensure they comply with Hypixel’s rules and use them responsibly.
> **Whoever wants to use them can simply enable the toggle for these in the Modrinth app.**

-----

### ⚠️ Notice

This modpack is intended to be **Hypixel-safe** and includes only widely accepted Skyblock utility mods.  
However, **no modification is ever officially approved by Hypixel**, and the server’s rules may change at any time.

By using this pack, you acknowledge that **all modifications are used at your own risk**, and neither the creators nor distributors of this pack take responsibility for any potential consequences.
